Why Brazilian Bakery Café
Experience the taste of Brazil at Brazilian Bakery Café! For 20 years, we've been serving authentic flavors and creating warm memories. Come savor our delicious pastries, cakes, and lunch buffet.
About us

What our clients say
Real reviews from our Customers
“Melhor padaria brasileira dentro dos EUA!”
Melhor padaria brasileira dentro dos EUA! Tudo é muito delicioso e virou uma parada obrigatória pra família nas nossas viagens quando passamos por Atlanta. O buffet de caldos de mandioquinha com costela é bom demais! Pastel de carne seca, coxinha e milkshake de cupuaçu foram meus preferidos! Parabéns pessoal!
Nubia Amaro
Verified Google Review
“Everything is delicious”
Always the best place to stop and enjoy some original, high quality, and well prepared Brazilian food. Everything is delicious, from sandwiches to desserts. Minha familia ama essa parada!!
Emilia Ribeiro
Verified Google Review
“The best bakery ever! ”
The best bakery ever! Great atmosphere for a family breakfast, lunch and dinner or just a simple Brazilian snack that you are craving for. Extremely clean, easy to find, plenty of space and many sitting options.
Marcelo Silva
Verified Google Review
“...Every bite reflects authentic flavors”
I have been a loyal customer of this Brazilian bakery for 7 years, and I can confidently say it is the best Brazilian establishment I’ve ever visited. The food is always exceptional—every bite reflects authentic flavors and top-notch quality.What makes the experience even more special is the outstanding customer service. I’m always warmly welcomed, and the staff ensures every visit feels personal and enjoyable.This bakery truly sets the standard for excellence in both food and hospitality. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for an authentic taste of Brazil paired with impeccable service!
Pink Me Up Brazilian Nail Salon
Verified Google Review
“Excelência em tudo que fazem...”
Excelência em tudo que fazem. Tudo de primeira qualidade. Simplesmente a melhor. Conheço pessoas que vem de outro estado e falam que gostariam de uma unidade dessa padaria onde moram.
Bruno Fraga
Verified Google Review
“This place is heaven on earth.”
I was looking for a quick stop and get something good, fresh and top notch pastries for my kids, this place is heaven on earth. I can’t even tell where to start, the coxinhas, passion fruit mousse, and oh yeah the Brazilian cakes, you must try Power milk with Strawberry !!! Please open a branch in Michigan. You will be a hit at home! :)
Pedro Araujo
Verified Google Review
“Service was also super quick and efficient”
First time trying a coxinha and it was amazing! The staff were super welcoming and patient with me, and the coxinhas were hot and crispy even after fifteen minutes of being in a takeout box. The portions and fillings were also very generous. Service was also super quick and efficient, and there weren't a whole lot of people on a weekday afternoon.
Anke Hao
Verified Google Review
“You must try these burgers”
I recently visited Brazilian Bakery, and it was an amazing experience! The pão de queijo was warm and cheesy, just like back home in Brazil. The coxinhas were perfectly crispy on the outside and deliciously tender on the inside. The staff was incredibly friendly and made me feel welcome from the moment I walked in.If you're looking for authentic Brazilian baked goods in Atlanta, this is the place to go. Highly recommend!
John DVE
Verified Google Review
“Brazilian bakery never disappoints...”
Brazilian bakery never disappoints. I’ve moved to the area about 2 years ago and since then it has been my go to place for any time I don’t want to cook, every time I want to invite someone something special, or any time I need good cake.
Natalia Perez
Verified Google Review



--- Page: /about ---
Our Story | Brazilian Bakery Cafe | Family-Owned Since 2004
Order online
Call Us
Our story started back in
2004
.
Brazilian Bakery Café was born in 2004 from a simple dream: to bring the authentic flavors of Brazil to our community in Georgia. What started as a small family-owned bakery has grown into a beloved local institution, known for its warm hospitality, homemade recipes, and the unmistakable aroma of fresh pão de queijo. Over the years, our dedication to quality and tradition has never changed. Every item we serve is prepared in-house, using recipes passed down through generations and perfected with love.
A Place of Community
As our community grew, so did we. Thanks to the trust and support of our customers, we expanded our team, our kitchen, and our dreams. Today, Brazilian Bakery Café serves not only as a place to eat but as a gathering space where families, friends, and cultures come together.With two locations and over 20 years of history, we continue to stay true to our roots while embracing innovation and growth. Whether you're joining us for a quick bite, a celebration, or catering your special event, know that you're a part of our story — and we’re honored to be a part of yours.
The values that drive everything we do
Love & Passion
We are committed to always pour love and passion into our food
Flavour
Flavour from our Brazilian Roots
Care & craft
Everything is made in house
Customer-first
You are the reason we work so hard everyday
Teamwork
To build a better company
Quality
Always the best, this is non-negotiable.
Come and visit us in Georgia

Order Catering Online Fast, Easy & Anytime!
We’ve made it simpler than ever to order your favorite Brazilian treats. No more phone calls — just click, choose date & time, and confirm. Explore our full catering menu and order online in minutes!

START YOUR ORDER NOW

meta.meta_description: Experience the best of Brazil at Brazilian Bakery Cafe. Authentic Brazilian pastries, cakes, and meals made fresh daily in Atlanta. Order online or visit us today!
